home.heading: Welcome to QWRT
home.body: This is the placeholder body text.

about.heading: About the Station
about.body: QWRT Radio is dedicated to independent music and live broadcasting 24/7. We curate playlists featuring emerging artists and host special shows. Our mission is to provide a platform for underground talent while keeping the community engaged.

updates.heading: Updates
updates.body: Here we will post updates about new shows, artist features, and station news. Stay tuned for the latest from QWRT Radio!

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.body: Email us at hello@qwrt.online for inquiries, feedback, or collaboration opportunities. Follow us on social media for the latest updates and behind-the-scenes content.

schedule.heading: Show Schedule
schedule.body: Our programming runs 24/7 with live shows on weekends. Check back here for the latest schedule updates and special broadcasts.
